sub_modules.conv1d_window: Builds the 5-sample causal window from the current input and four registered history taps.
sub_modules.conv1d_tap_mult: Applies the fixed FIR coefficients [2, 8, 12, 8, 2] to the flattened sample window.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Sums the five widened tap products into the fixed-point MAC result.
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W and returns the extended-width filtered output.
